issues.sample: Manual transmission: Shift from 1st to 2nd can be difficult at times and can only experience partial engagement of 2nd gear causing grinding and/or popping out of gear when releasing the clutch pedal along with loss of thrust.

narrative.headline: What 2024 Cadillac Ct4 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 7 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (29% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: Manual transmission: Shift from 1st to 2nd can be difficult at times and can only experience partial engagement of 2nd gear causing grinding and/or popping out of gear when releasing the clutch pedal along with loss of thrust.
